# Comprehensive Reliabilism

**Node Type:** synthesis
**Node ID:** e5861988-bbfa-4c90-8ebb-62c445bb7d45
**Depth:** 5
**Terminal:** No

**Parent:** [How do we account for cognitive faculties in non-biological entities?](how-do-we-account-for-cognitive-faculties-in-non-biological-entities-antithesis-4cf44fc1-0577-47fb-a9da-8dcd4cf1a073.md)

## Content

**Knowledge is true belief generated by reliable processes**, **A process, whether biological or artificial, leads to knowledge if it consistently produces true beliefs**, **A system knows a proposition if its method of belief formation is reliable irrespective of its origin**, **A person or system knows a proposition if the proposition is true and formed by reliable cognitive processes**
